passes.name: Drop-in Class
terms: If not cancelled 2h before class starts, no refund.

passes.name: 5-Class Pass
terms: Valid for 3 months from purchase date.
If not cancelled 2h before class starts, considered used.

passes.name: 10-Class Pass
terms: Valid for 6 months from purchase date.
If not cancelled 2h before class starts, considered used.

passes.name: Monthly Unlimited
terms: Unlimited classes for 30 days from purchase date.

passes.name: Annual Membership
terms: Unlimited classes for 12 months from purchase date.
